message:
Command `# Log actively growing (21.9MB), LR alive (25.5% CPU), synthesis ongoing
# Wait 1 hour then check again
sleep 3600
echo "=== 1-hour check: $(date) ==="
ps -p 286668 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "alive" || echo "DONE"
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | grep "^[0-9]" | head -10
echo "---"
stat -c "%s bytes" /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log
tail -5 /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log` executed with exit code -1.

function.arguments:
{"command": "# Log actively growing (21.9MB), LR alive (25.5% CPU), synthesis ongoing
# Wait 1 hour then check again
sleep 3600
echo "=== 1-hour check: $(date) ==="
ps -p 286668 -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "alive" || echo "DONE"
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | grep "^[0-9]" | head -10
echo "---"
stat -c "%s bytes" /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log
tail -5 /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log", "timeout": 4200}
function.name: execute_bash

content:

tail -5 /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log" timed out
